opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up with this pounding headache at the back of my head, my nose started bleeding out of nowhere, and I feel incredibly dizzy.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Woke with a throbbing occipital headache, had a spontaneous nosebleed, feels dizzy, and a home cuff showed a very high blood pressure - very anxious.

symptom_narrative.onset: woke this morning with a dull headache at the back of the head, worsening over about 4 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: headache building over ~4 hours; a nosebleed that lasted 10 minutes and stopped with pressure
symptom_narrative.character: a throbbing pounding headache at the back of the head, with dizziness/lightheadedness on sudden exertion
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the headache is bad and the high home reading has him extremely anxious
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse in the morning; dizziness on standing/exerting suddenly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting; the nosebleed settled with pressure
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: heart pounding (palpitations) and easy fatigue over the last month; denies chest pain, breathlessness or weakness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: diagnosed with high blood pressure 5 years ago; stopped his tablet 6 months ago because he felt fine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: resting at home, holding a tissue to the nose, very anxious

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, diagnosed about 5 years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: was on a daily tablet (amlodipine) but stopped it about 6 months ago because he felt fine

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: high-salt snack foods; blood pressure cuff at home showing very high readings

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened by the high home reading and nosebleed; wants reassurance but also worried something catastrophic is happening

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious, repeatedly references the high home BP numbers

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff during acute anxiety; may over-read
